arts.ttl: Man United, Newcastle 'handed boost' in pursuit of Premier League wonderkid
arts.sum: Former Manchester United chief scout Mick Brown says that Southampton would almost certainly be forced to sell Tyler Dibling if they are relegated from the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'My body's breaking' - Ex-Palace & Newcastle striker Gayle to retire
arts.sum: Hibernian forward Dwight Gayle says his "body is breaking down" and he intends to retire as a player at the end of this season.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United players get mentality change order after team meeting
arts.sum: Newcastle United star Dan Burn has ordered a mentality switch ahead of the long haul trip to Ipswich Town. Burn told Chronicle Live: "It has been a long time since Newcastle have been down to Ipswich.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United make 'respect' promise to star with January transfer talks now active
arts.sum: The 30-year-old is one of the favourites to leave Newcastle this January and as Chronicle Live reported last night, talks between the club and Almiron's representatives are active as far as a possible departure is concerned for the South American. Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe says he will show Miguel Almiron the "respect he deserves" as long as he's at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Five goalscorers to look out for this weekend: Mbeumo to help cut down Forest
arts.sum: Bryan Mbeumo has been in sensational form for Brentford and is one of Tom Hill's five goalscorers to look out for this weekend.

arts.ttl: ‘Makes no sense’ – Paper rejects idea of Newcastle star’s January exit, ‘anything could happen’ in the summer
arts.sum: A couple of days ago, Newcastle United’s Sandro Tonali was frontpage news in Italy. There was said to be interest from Juventus and Corriere dello Sport had mentioned that the midfielder is valued at €55m by Newcastle United. arts.ttl: Team News: Ipswich Town vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Ipswich Town and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Club could make offer for Newcastle United man – Feeling drop in player valuation can lead to exit
arts.sum: Lewis Miley has only been a bit-part player at Newcastle United this season. The teenager has yet to feature even in the Premier League and his only appearance in the campaign came in the Carabao Cup earlier in the season. Amidst a lack of game time, doubts have emerged about Miley’s future and InterLive today The post Club could make offer for Newcastle United man – Feeling drop in player valuation can lead to exit appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United make 'almost redundant' admission about right transfer target after scouts' work
arts.sum: Newcastle will contest their third game in a week against Ipswich Town on Saturday and by the time the black-and-whites' match against Bournemouth finishes on January 18, Howe's team will have played nine fixtures in three competitions in just five weeks. Newcastle, after all, have not won away from home since September and the last time the Magpies played games in such quick succession, Howe's team were thumped at Brentford just days after going toe-to-toe with Liverpool in a thrilling 3-3 draw.
